description_long: This is a freestanding, open-shelved storage unit with a minimalist industrial design. It features four evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by a black metal frame, with each shelf appearing to be made of a light-colored wood or laminate. The frame consists of slender vertical and horizontal bars, providing structural support while maintaining an airy, open look. The shelves are flat and rectangular, offering ample surface area for storing or displaying items. There are no doors, drawers, or visible handles, and the sides are completely open, making all shelves easily accessible. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban interiors.
description: A freestanding, open-shelved storage unit with four light-colored shelves and a black metal frame, designed for easy access and sturdy support.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four open shelves and the full width of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile and depth of the shelves, with the open frame visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the open shelves and frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the unit's depth and open construction.
